summary: auth login: replace the post-login "Token saved to <path>" stdout line with one that names the credential persistence and the reason (Dreo issues no refresh_token, so user/pass is kept on disk to re-mint the bearer).
reason: The PR description previously claimed the plaintext password was never persisted to disk, but config.go intentionally serializes DreoPassword to the 0600 config file so unattended re-login can mint a fresh bearer (Dreo's OAuth response carries no refresh_token). The user-facing success line now reflects what actually happens; README.md already documents this accurately.
